title: bulbostylis capillaris var. microstachya
intro: Bulbostylis capillaris var. microstachya, also known as the dwarf bulrush or small-flowered club-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bulbostylis capillaris var. microstachya include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the dried stems and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
